hero.title: Equipment Catalog for Institutional Procurement
hero.description: PEIC-manufactured sterilization systems and supported partner technologies organized for hospital, project, biomedical, and tender evaluation.

manufacturing.title: PEIC Indigenous Manufacturing
manufacturing.description: Our core manufacturing program adheres to stringent regulatory and quality standards.
manufacturing.advantages_subtitle: We are the OEM — not a reseller. Every advantage flows from deep engineering DNA.

advantages.title: In-House Engineering
advantages.description: Design, test, and iterate in our Vadodara facility — not outsourced.

advantages.title: BIS-Certified Since 1976
advantages.description: Longest-running IS 3829 certification in the sterilization category.

advantages.title: Local Spare Parts
advantages.description: Localized spare parts inventory — no import delays for critical components.

advantages.title: Tender Support
advantages.description: MSME/NSIC documentation support where applicable, with final eligibility reviewed tender by tender.

partners.title: Global & Domestic Partner Technologies
partners.description: Authorized technical integration partner for the world's leading medical technology brands.
partners.advantages_subtitle: Integration, service, and procurement support through one accountable technical partner.

advantages.title: Technical Integration
advantages.description: Installation, calibration, and training support instead of equipment-only delivery.

advantages.title: Unified Service
advantages.description: One service relationship for PEIC-manufactured and supported partner equipment.

advantages.title: Local Coordination
advantages.description: Local coordination for technical queries, service requests, and parts requirements.

advantages.title: Single-Point Procurement
advantages.description: A single point of contact for multi-brand institutional procurement.

cta.label: Product Support
cta.title: Shortlist equipment with procurement-ready context
cta.description: Tell us the department, quantity, city, and tender stage. PEIC will help route specifications, pricing, and technical guidance.
